data.title: Triple-therapy immunotherapy shows promise in eliminating leukemia in preclinical models. Key milestone reached in fight against blood cancer.
data.description: GT Biopharma, Inc. has recently reported significant progress in the field of triple-therapy immunotherapy. According to a news commentary released from Vancouver, BC on December 4, 2025, the company's innovative approach has resulted in complete leukemia elimination in preclinical models. This breakthrough is achieved by reprogramming the process through which cancer cells die, thereby activating strong immune responses. The promising results of this triple-therapy approach highlight its potential to revolutionize leukemia treatment. This news showcases the latest advancements in the fight against cancer and underscores the importance of immunotherapy research.

data.title: Five Below reports $1.04B revenue, beats estimates. Q3 earnings at 68 cents per share exceed 24 cents estimate. Q4 guidance: $1.58B-$1.61B revenue, $3.36-$3.54 EPS.Raised full-year guidance.
data.description: Five Below Inc (NASDAQ: FIVE) exceeded expectations in its third-quarter financial report with $1.04 billion in revenue, surpassing the estimated $983.07 million. Adjusted earnings of 68 cents per share also outperformed the anticipated 24 cents per share. CEO Winnie Park expressed excitement over the results, highlighting over $1 billion in sales for two consecutive quarters and strong double-digit same-store sales growth. The company projects fourth-quarter revenue between $1.58 billion and $1.61 billion, with adjusted earnings ranging from $3.36 to $3.54 per share. Analysts had forecasted revenue around $1.56 billion and adjusted earnings of $3.10 per share. Additionally, Five Below raised its full-year revenue guidance.

data.title: Permuta Technologies awarded 2025 HIRE Vets Gold Medallion Award along with 838 other companies for commitment to...
data.description: Vienna, Virginia - Permuta Technologies, Inc. has proudly received the prestigious 2025 Hire Vets Gold Medallion Award. The company was honored along with 838 other organizations by the U.S. Secretary of Labor in a virtual ceremony for their dedication to supporting veterans in the workforce.

data.title: Duke Energy praises DOE's nuclear investments, advancing SMR deployment in the U.S., including support for TVA and GE Vernova Hitachi.
data.description: Duke Energy is emphasizing cost reduction along with ensuring reliability and economic growth. A federal cost-share project is in place to aid the deployment of small modular reactors by Tennessee Valley Authority and GE Vernova Hitachi. This initiative aligns with Duke Energy's strategy and aims to support the development of these reactors. The announcement was made in Charlotte, North Carolina on December 4, 2025.

data.title: Westinghouse and PROMATION partner for nuclear projects worldwide; PROMATION to provide equipment for AP1000® and AP300™.
data.description: In Peterborough, Ontario, Westinghouse Electric Company and PROMATION Ltd have entered a memorandum of understanding (MoU) to assist in nuclear new-build endeavors in Canada and around the world. The agreement opens the door for PROMATION to offer robotics, tooling, and equipment for AP1000® and AP300™ projects, potentially impacting a significant number of nuclear initiatives. This partnership signifies a commitment to collaboration and quality between the two companies.

data.title: Jessica Volkenant appointed as Regional VP-Sales for Minneapolis location of Atmosphere Commercial Interiors by Omni Workspace.
data.description: Omni Workspace has appointed Jessica Volkenant as the new Regional Vice President—Sales for Atmosphere Commercial Interiors in Minneapolis, starting from December 2, 2025. Atmosphere, based in Minneapolis, caters to a wide range of clients in the region.

data.title: Crude oil up 1%; Kroger shares down 6% after Q3 results. Dow at 47,864.12, Nasdaq at 23,503.59. S&P 500 at 6,857.63.
data.description: During midday trading, U.S. stocks saw a positive trend, with the Nasdaq Composite rising by 0.2%. The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a slight dip of 0.04% to 47,864.12, while the NASDAQ increased by 0.21% to reach 23,503.59. The S&P 500 also showed gains, up by 0.12% to 6,857.63. Industrials shares led the sectors with a significant rise of 0.7%, whereas consumer staples stocks fell by 1.2% on Wednesday. Kroger Company (NYSE: KR) witnessed a 6% decline in its stock value following the release of mixed quarterly results, featuring adjusted earnings per share of $1.05 for Q3, surpassing the analyst estimate of $1.03. However, the quarterly sales of $33.859 billion fell short of the expected $34.155 billion. Polyrizon Ltd. (NASDAQ: PLRZ) saw a substantial 92% surge in its shares to $13.59. For more details, the full story is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Snowflake beats Q3 estimates with $1.21B revenue, 35 cents per share earnings. Expects $1.195B-$1.2B revenue in Q4. CEO optimistic on AI impact.
data.description: Snowflake Inc (NYSE: SNOW) released its third-quarter financial results, surpassing analyst expectations. The company reported $1.21 billion in revenue, exceeding the projected $1.18 billion. Adjusted earnings were also higher than anticipated, at 35 cents per share compared to the estimated 31 cents per share. Snowflake's CEO, Sridhar Ramaswamy, highlighted the company's significance in customers' data and AI strategies, with their enterprise AI agent, Snowflake Intelligence, experiencing rapid adoption. The company anticipates a 27% year-over-year increase in fourth-quarter product revenue, estimating it to fall between $1.195 billion and $1.20 billion. Snowflake foresees an adjusted operating margin of 7%.

data.title: Gymkhana, a two Michelin-starred London restaurant, opens in Las Vegas at ARIA Resort & Casino, its first US location.
data.description: A prestigious London restaurant with Two Michelin stars, Gymkhana, has made its debut in the United States at ARIA Resort & Casino in Las Vegas. This marks the first U.S. location for the acclaimed eatery. The restaurant has garnered two Michelin stars for its exceptional cuisine. The opening in Las Vegas signifies a significant expansion for Gymkhana into the American market. The move is part of the restaurant's growth strategy to cater to a wider audience. ARIA Resort & Casino provides a luxurious setting for Gymkhana's U.S. launch, offering guests an elevated dining experience.

data.title: Increase in cryptocurrency exchange hacks prompts development of new prevention strategies. Learn how advanced detection systems secure digital assets against risks. (Read More)
data.description: With the rise in cryptocurrency exchange hacks, there is a growing need for new prevention tactics. Advanced detection systems are being developed to reduce risks and safeguard digital assets. These strategies aim to enhance security and prevent losses in the face of increasing cyber threats targeting exchanges. By implementing these measures, exchanges can better protect the significant amounts of digital currency traded daily and prevent potential financial losses.

data.title: NVIDIA CEO supports nuclear energy on Joe Rogan podcast, boosting SMR stock. Can help NuScale, Nano Nuclear, Oklo recover. Check out more on Benzinga.com.
data.description: NVIDIA Corp.'s CEO Jensen Huang recently endorsed the nuclear sector on "The Joe Rogan Experience" podcast, leading to a surge in SMR stock prices. This has brought hope to small nuclear reactor developers like NuScale Power Corp., Nano Nuclear Energy, Inc., and Oklo, Inc., who faced significant stock declines in November. Could Huang's show of support help turn around their fortunes? For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Glenfarne and POSCO International Corporation partner for Alaska LNG project, signing definitive agreements.
data.description: The partnership between Alaska LNG and POSCO International has been solidified through the signing of definitive agreements, as announced in Washington. This collaboration is set to bring significant benefits to both parties, with the deal marking a crucial step in enhancing their strategic positions in the market. The agreements signal a promising future for the companies involved, highlighting their shared commitment to success and growth in the LNG sector. This latest development underscores the increasing importance of strategic partnerships in driving innovation and competitiveness in the industry.

data.title: Masimo forecasts 7%-10% revenue growth by 2028, targeting 30% operating margins. Aims for $8 adjusted EPS and $1 billion in operating cash flow from 2026-2028.
data.description: Masimo Corp (NASDAQ: MASI) recently conducted its 2025 Investor Day, where the management team shared insights on the company's long-term strategy. The event shed light on the company's growth pillars, revealing a projected revenue Compound Annual Growth Rate (CAGR) of 7%–10% until 2028, with operating margins approaching 30%. Masimo aims for an adjusted EPS of $8.00 by 2028 and anticipates generating around $1 billion in cumulative operating cash flow from 2026 to 2028. The company also restated its 2025 financial guidance, including revenue targets of $1.51 million-$1.53 million. For further details, see the complete article on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Salesforce's Q3 results receive positive feedback from analysts, with price targets ranging from $300 to $400. Total revenue close to guidance with $2.2B in free cash flows and $4.2B returned to shareholders. CRPO grew 11% in constant currency.
data.description: Salesforce Inc. (NYSE: CRM) saw its shares rise after reporting strong third-quarter results. Analysts were positive on the company, with Canaccord Genuity, JPMorgan, Wedbush, Goldman Sachs, and Needham maintaining Buy ratings and setting price targets ranging from $300 to $400. Canaccord Genuity noted Salesforce's steady results with revenue close to guidance, while JPMorgan highlighted an 11% growth in current remaining performance obligations (cRPO). The company generated $2.2 billion in free cash flow, returned $4.2 billion to shareholders through share repurchases and dividends. Guggenheim Securities analyst John DiFucci reiterated a Neutral rating on the stock. Salesforce's outlook remains positive, with its stock performing well post-earnings report.
